name: Driveitaway Holdings, Inc.
summary: DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. is a national dealer-focused mobility platform enabling car dealers to sell vehicles through eCommerce via an app-based subscription-to-ownership program called 'Drive Now, Decide Later.' The platform allows consumers regardless of credit history to subscribe to vehicles, with rental payments writing down the purchase price. The company also provides subscription programs for Electric Vehicles and offers dealers proprietary mobile technology, insurance coverages, and training.

products.name: DriveItAway Consumer App
products.description: App-based vehicle subscription-to-ownership platform allowing consumers to select, sign for, and pick up vehicles digitally with payments reducing purchase price.

products.name: Pay as You Go Subscription Program
products.description: Flexible subscription program for automotive dealers enabling vehicle subscriptions for consumers regardless of credit history or down payment.

products.name: EV Subscription Platform
products.description: Expanded subscription-to-ownership platform enabling entry-level consumers to drive and acquire new Electric Vehicles.

products.name: DIA Leasing, LLC
products.description: Wholly owned Florida subsidiary formed April 2024 to support leasing operations.

partnerships.description: Company sold its Learning Business subsidiaries to StroomX, LLC, controlled by former CEO Christopher Rego, for $150,000 consideration.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
